Class Bucket<T extends Point>

java.lang.Object
com.ggalmazor.downsampling.lttb.Bucket<T>
Type Parameters:
T - the type of the Point points in this bucket
public class Bucket<T extends Point> extends Object
Represents a bucket of Point points being downsampled to a single point by LTTB.

startIndex and endIndex (exclusive) are the positions of this bucket's points in the original input list. They are used by the DoublePoint fast path in LargestTriangleThreeBuckets to index into pre-extracted coordinate arrays directly, avoiding per-point virtual dispatch through Point.x() and Point.y().

    Returns the end index (exclusive) of this bucket's points in the original input list.

    T

    Returns the result point selected for this bucket.
    int
    getStartIndex()
    Returns the start index (inclusive) of this bucket's points in the original input list.

    • of

      public static <U extends Point> Bucket<U> of(List<U> points, int startIndex, int endIndex)
      Utility factory that takes a sublist view and its absolute indices in the original input.
      Type Parameters:
      U - the type of the Point points in the bucket being built
      Parameters:
      points - the input list of points in the bucket being built
      startIndex - the start index (inclusive) in the original input list
      endIndex - the end index (exclusive) in the original input list
      Returns:
      the bucket

    • of

      public static <U extends Point> Bucket<U> of(U point, int pointIndex)
      Utility factory that returns a Bucket with a single Point point.
      Type Parameters:
      U - the type of the Point point in the bucket being built
      Parameters:
      point - the input point in the bucket being built
      pointIndex - the index of this point in the original input list
      Returns:
      the bucket

    • points

      public List<T> points()
      Returns a read-only view of the points in this bucket.

      Used in the hot inner loop of Triangle.getResult() to iterate candidates without allocating an intermediate mapped collection.

      Returns:
      an unmodifiable view of the points in this bucket
